basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow has released the official Academic Assistant Notification 2026 on the official website of IIM Lucknow. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced under the IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates (no age limit specified) with a qualification of Post-graduation in Agricultural Economics, Economics, Resource Economics, Agri-business Management, or Food and Agri-business Management from a recognized/reputed Institute/University in regular mode with a minimum of 60% marks can apply via email up to 10 July 2026 (05:00 PM). how_to_apply: Eligible candidates should email their complete application to [email protected] by 10 July 2026.

important_instructions: Incomplete applications and applications received after the last date shall be summarily rejected. The appointment will commence in July 2026. This is a contractual position with no claim for regular appointment.

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Applications are invited for the position of Academic Assistant in the Agri-business Management (ABM) Area at Indian Institute of Management Lucknow. Download IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Overview
IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

rows.date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: The role involves providing academic and administrative support to faculty members in the ABM Area. Key responsibilities include: Assisting in development and preparation of course materials (lecture notes, presentations, assignments, case studies) Supporting the evaluation process – review, assessment, and grading of student work Assisting the Area Chair in coordinating academic activities Collaborating with faculty for effective delivery of academic programs

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: Post-graduate in Agricultural Economics / Economics / Resource Economics / Agri-business Management / Food and Agri-business Management from a recognized/reputed Institute/University in regular mode with minimum 60% marks. Desired Qualifications and Experience: Minimum 2-3 years of relevant research/project/teaching experience (candidates with experience at IIMs/Institutes of National Importance preferred) Working knowledge of MS Word, Excel, and PowerPoint is essential

content_sections.heading: How to Apply IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates should email their complete application to [email protected] by 10 July 2026. This article is prepared strictly following your stored structure without any changes. Let me know if you need further modifications!

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions:
content_sections.text: Incomplete applications and applications received after the last date shall be summarily rejected. The appointment will commence in July 2026. This is a contractual position with no claim for regular appointment.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications is 10 July 2026 up to 05:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Academic Assistant at IIM Lucknow ABM Area?
faq.answer: Consolidated fellowship of Rs. 40,000/- per month along with HRA as per institute rules.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: Only 01 (One) position is available in the Agri-business Management Area.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: Post-graduate degree in Agricultural Economics, Agri-business Management or related fields with minimum 60% marks.

faq.question: Q5. What is the duration of appointment for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant?
faq.answer: Initially 6 months, extendable based on satisfactory performance.

faq.question: Q6. How to apply for IIM Lucknow ABM Academic Assistant 2026?
faq.answer: Send complete CV (with highest degree, institution, experience and last drawn salary) along with a cover letter to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience mandatory for IIM Lucknow Academic Assistant post?
faq.answer: Minimum 2-3 years of relevant experience is desired. Candidates with IIMs/Institutes of National Importance experience are preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: No, the position is purely temporary and contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q9. Will shortlisted candidates be informed about the interview?
faq.answer: Yes, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email with interview details.

faq.question: Q10. Will TA/DA be provided for attending the interview at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: No, candidates will have to attend at their own expense. No TA/DA will be provided.
